meaning: adj.即将来临的,接近的n.来临
examples: He strayed into the path of an oncoming car.
There is no way to stop the oncoming wave.
A passenger train carrying hundreds of workers home from the center of Tokyo is reported to have hit an oncoming goods train.
Well, the oncoming water crisis is going to make water shortage, cleanliness and access regular headlines.
It's bound to be the early pace-maker for the oncoming glut of summer blockbusters.
